text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 54 

CLNC_VISIT_CHRG_AMT 

LABEL: Clinic Visit Charge Amount ($) 

DESCRIPTION: The charge amount (rounded to whole dollars) for clinic visits (e.g., visits to chronic pain or dental 
centers or to clinics providing psychiatric, OB-GYN, pediatric services) related to the beneficiary's stay. 

SHORT NAME: CLNC_AMT 

LONG NAME: CLNC_VISIT_CHRG_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived)
